Used the service twice to go from San Francisco to Santa Clara for NHL and NFL games.

It is easy to understand which tickets you need as on the on screen display and purchase is simple. 

Both trains were initially  on time and all stops were called out and shown on onboard screens.  Following the NFL game they delayed departure from the initial stop by a few minutes to allow its arrival at Mountain View station to coincide with the arrival of the local VTA from Levi Stadium, allowing all the football fans going back towards San Francisco to board the train rather than waiting a further 25 min for the next service.
The new electric trains are comfortable, clean, quiet, and on time. The new schedule is also convenient and the travel times are fast.
